creator: julian@hsiao.email
text: The port description currently lists the upstream URL as "http://www.lz4.info/", but that actually points to a Japanese house construction company. The correct URL appears to be "http://www.lz4.org/", which redirects to "http://lz4.github.io/lz4/". Alternatively, pointing to the project's Github page at "https://github.com/lz4/lz4" is a possibility.
